welcomeMessage.message: 👋 Thanks for opening an issue! Please make sure you've provided enough details for us to help you effectively.

responseTemplates.needsMoreInfo: This issue needs more information. Please provide: 1) Game version, 2) Mod version, 3) Steps to reproduce, 4) Expected vs actual behavior.
responseTemplates.duplicateFound: This appears to be a duplicate of #{issueNumber}. Please continue the discussion there.
responseTemplates.fixedInVersion: This issue should be fixed in version {version}. Please update and check if the issue persists.
